goal: Record current M1 smoke recertification evidence after the previously reported toolchain mismatch no longer reproduces. Scope is evidence and operational handoff only: document that `COREPACK_HOME=/tmp/corepack PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHON_BIN=./.venv/bin/python ./scripts/bootstrap_dev.sh --phase m1-smoke --skip-install` passes, capture generated reports, and preserve remaining M6 real-adapter NOT_GO status. Do not change product code, do not weaken checks, and do not claim M6-RC GO.
head: f8256ad
blocked_scope: Runtime, export, training, UI, schema, script, or test changes
Changing toolchain expectations or weakening bootstrap checks
Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
M6-RC GO/sign-off changes before real adapter endpoint evidence or release-policy decision
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate records verification state only. It may commit generated review/security reports from the smoke command and evidence docs.
required_evidence: toolchain_report.json shows all strict checks true
file_size_report.json records only soft violations and no hard violations
pip_audit_cuda.json skip status is documented for skip-install environment
Explicit note that M6-RC remains NOT_GO for real adapter endpoint evidence
warnings: The m1-smoke command allows pip-audit skip in a --skip-install environment and records that skip in artifacts/security/pip_audit_cuda.json.
file_size_report.json records soft LOC warnings, including services/worker/handlers/export.py, but no hard failures.
M6-RC remains NOT_GO until real trained adapter endpoint evidence exists or release policy explicitly accepts fixture-adapter evidence.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped evidence contract for M1 smoke recertification.
phase_notes.audit: Read bootstrap_dev.sh, toolchain report, pip-audit skip report, and file size report. The previous toolchain mismatch no longer reproduces.
phase_notes.build: Record evidence and update WORKING.md without product code changes.
phase_notes.check: Contract JSON validation, m1-smoke --skip-install, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check passed. Smoke output confirms the previous toolchain mismatch no longer reproduces.
phase_notes.done: Evidence recorded in artifacts/review/m1_smoke_recertification_evidence.md and docs/WORKING.md. M1 smoke is GO for the current environment; M6-RC remains NOT_GO until real trained adapter endpoint evidence exists or release policy explicitly accepts fixture-adapter evidence.

pabcd.approved_scope: M1 smoke recertification evidence and operational handoff only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product code changes, no toolchain weakening, no model/adapter artifacts, no release GO changes.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
